scene.message: SP: Ah{wait_fr:30}, my head... it{wait_fr:30}{nl} hurts...{waitkey}Judgment upon mankind!!{waitkey}{ret}
SP: My head feels heavy...{nl} like a hungover morning.{waitkey}{ret}
SP: Mankind has no need of a{nl} future!! Don't you all agree?{waitkey}{ret}
SP: The future, hm... I've{nl} suddenly grown uneasy.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: That person seems sane.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Good thing those weird{nl} signals stopped.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: This is bad. Let's{nl} hurry on!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Finally came to their{nl} senses, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: It seems there are{nl} sane people besides us.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What were we born{nl} for...{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30} hm.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Don't you kinda feel{nl} an ache deep in your head?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Oh good~{waitkey}Everyone's eyes are back to{nl} normal.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Dehya~ Are these guys{nl} seriously saying that?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Those signals are{nl} scary, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: There's no use staying{nl} here.{waitkey}Let's hurry on ahead.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: There's no use staying{nl} here.{waitkey}Let's hurry on ahead.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Unforgivable.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{waitkey}{ret}
